name: Path of Exile
description: Build analysis via headless Path of Building — paste a build link for DPS, defence, and gear breakdown
limitations: Build analysis only — no live character data yet (GGG API access pending)
Timeless jewel calculations are not supported

pob_calc.name: PoB Build Calculator
pob_calc.description: Analyze a Path of Building build from a URL. Accepts pobb.in, pastebin.com, pob.savecraft.gg, or any link containing a PoB build code. Returns structured DPS, defence, resistance, skill, item, and passive tree data.

build.description: URL to a PoB build — a pobb.in link, pastebin link, or any URL hosting a PoB build code. Do NOT pass raw base64 build codes.
